calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-victoire, S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Richard Snyder, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bankruptcy Receivables Management.
Plaintiff's Witness: Bruce Jackman, also present
Defendant: renie A. Morales, present in pro per.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Stipulated for entry of judgment in the amount of $3,650.00 and 10% Interest, stayed of enforcement as long as the Defendant making monthly payment of $100.00, starting on July 15, 2006, with 30 days grace period and $1,000.00 penalty for late payment of more than 30 days.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2006 Set For Trial On Jun-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
